sourceBreakdownDescription: Generative engines identified from source, referrer, or GA4 UTM values.
topPagesDescription: Public pages viewed after a detected AI visit. Private routes such as /admin are hidden.
trafficTrendDescription: Detected AI visits aggregated by day.
googleConnectionDescription: Connect your Google account, then select the GA4 property to use.
loadingAvailableProperties: Loading the properties available in your Google account...
noPropertyLoaded: No property loaded yet. Refresh the list after Google connection.
manualConnectionDescription: Use this option if you want to connect GA4 with a JSON service account.
manualStep1: In Google Cloud, create or open a project and enable the Google Analytics Data API.
manualStep2: Create a Service Account, then generate a JSON key.
manualStep3: In GA4, open Admin, Property access management, then add the Service Account email with the Editor role.
manualStep4: Copy the numeric GA4 property ID from Property details.
manualStep5: Paste that ID and the full JSON below, then connect.
serviceAccountHelpIntro: Can’t find the Service Account JSON? In Google Cloud, open
serviceAccountHelpMiddle: choose the service account, then go to
serviceAccountHelpEnd: key, then reconnect GA4 with that file.
ga4SetupSuccessDescription: Default + AI channel group and AI channel are ready.
ga4SetupPartialTitle: GA4 AI Traffic tracking partially configured
ga4SetupPartialDescription: One GA4 resource still needs checking.
ga4SetupErrorTitle: GA4 AI Traffic tracking not configured
ga4SetupErrorDescription: Google Analytics rejected the automatic configuration.
ga4SetupPendingProperty: GA4 LLM tracking will be available after selecting a property.
ga4SetupGuidanceChannelGroup: GA4 rejected automatic creation of the Default + AI channel group. We try several field names through the Admin API; if it still fails, create the channel group manually in Admin > Channel groups with the AI channel before Referral. Technical detail: {{message}}
pageBaseline: Visits coming from AI engines when Google Analytics 4 can identify the source.
reportUnavailableAfterConnection: GA4 connection saved. The report is temporarily unavailable.
reportUnavailableRetryRefresh: GA4 connection saved. The report is temporarily unavailable. Try Refresh again.
noRealGa4DataForPeriod: No real GA4 data is available for this period.
kpiAiVisitsDescription: GA4 sessions whose source or referrer identifies a generative engine, such as ChatGPT or Perplexity.
kpiEngagementRateDescription: Share of detected AI visits considered engaged by GA4: significant duration, conversion, or at least two page views.
kpiConversionsDescription: Events marked as conversions or key events in GA4 during these detected AI visits.
kpiAvgVisitDurationDescription: Average duration of a detected AI visit, computed from the GA4 average session duration metric.
completeGoogleAnalyticsConnectionError: Unable to complete the Google Analytics connection.
selectProjectBeforeConnectGa4: Select a project before connecting GA4.
fillPropertyIdAndServiceJson: Enter the Property ID and the service account JSON.
connectGa4Error: Unable to connect GA4 for this project.
selectProjectBeforeConnectGoogleAnalytic: Select a project before connecting Google Analytics.
prepareGoogleAnalyticsRedirectError: Unable to prepare the Google Analytics redirect.
missingGoogleAnalyticsConnectionUrl: Google Analytics did not return a connection URL.
startGoogleAnalyticsConnectionError: Unable to start the Google Analytics connection.
selectGa4PropertyError: Unable to select this GA4 property.
disconnectGa4Error: Unable to disconnect GA4 for this project.
loadTrafficReportError: Unable to load the Traffic report.
